text.title: PR Time + Cost Diff Tool Failure Modes
text.summary: Three antipatterns observed when introducing a PR-time cost-diff checker. Each pairs symptom + root-cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Cost-diff numbers swing ±20% between runs of the same PR; reviewers stop trusting the comment.
antipattern.root-cause: Replay used temperature > 0 or no sampler seed; pipeline is stochastic.
antipattern.fix: Set temperature 0 or pin a sampler seed; freeze eval-set hash; rerun until median delta is stable across 3 runs.

antipattern.symptom: Cost report shows +15% on a PR that didn't touch any LLM file; reviewers blame the PR.
antipattern.root-cause: Cost table was updated by vendor price change between runs; not versioned.
antipattern.fix: Version cost-table.yaml; pin cost_table_version per PR run; flag table updates in a separate PR.

antipattern.symptom: PR cuts $/req 40% by swapping model; merges; user reports rise within a week.
antipattern.root-cause: Report omitted eval_pass_rate_pct — silent regression slipped through.
antipattern.fix: Make eval_pass_rate_pct a required field; warn when accuracy delta < -1pp; fail when < -3pp.
